title: anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. demnatense
intro: Anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. demnatense, also known as Atlas toadflax, is a plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. demnatense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an expectorant. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
